response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level role. While technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node) align with requirements, the seniority mismatch creates significant overqualification risk: likely compensation expectations exceed budget, probable disengagement with entry-level scope, and high flight risk. PostgreSQL and Nest.js are not explicitly demonstrated (MongoDB is the listed relational/NoSQL experience). On-site presence in Berlin is feasible based on location.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience across multiple roles
Berlin-based, full-stack breadth from database to UI
Exposure to AI/MCP agent infrastructure aligns with nice-to-haves
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer for an entry-level role
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js explicitly shown (MongoDB instead)
High flight risk and likely salary expectations above junior band
